title: Universal App Engine Config
description: Developer-facing engine configuration that defines app model sources/outputs for deterministic generation and workspace caching.

version.description: Schema version for this engine config.

userConfigPath.description: Workspace-relative path to the user-facing app config TOML.

globalStatePath.description: Workspace-relative path to the generated app-global-state JSON cache.

persistedStatePath.description: Workspace-relative path to the persisted runtime state JSON (machine-written).

universalConfigPath.description: Path to the universal registry contract TOML (workspace override takes priority).

mode.description: How to handle secret-like fields when writing app-global-state.json.

keyPatterns.description: Case-insensitive substring patterns for keys to redact.

meta.description: Optional shared metadata envelope for identity/access/policy/topology/runtime context.
